description:
Transcribe audio files using Speech-to-Text with the Cartesia Ink Whisper model.

Select the Language of your audio file. Default is English (en).

Supported Languages:
English (en)
Chinese (zh)
German (de)
Spanish (es)
Russian (ru)
Korean (ko)
French (fr)
Japanese (ja)
